title: astragalus umbellatus
intro: Astragalus umbellatus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Mongolia and China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and saponin content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against respiratory infections. Astragalus umbellatus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
